name: Tom Smith
goals:
Stay socially connected: wants shared experiences with friends
Explore the city in new ways: enjoys discovering places but needs motivation to go out
Competition: leaderboards, rankings, proving himself
Belonging to a team or faction: being part of something bigger
frustrations:
Limited immersion in mobile games: feels like mobile games are too casual
Friends don’t always play the same games: hard to coordinate multiplayer fun in real life
Battery limitations: mobile AR apps can drain phone battery quickly
Limited role-play freedom: wants to create his own identity in-game rather than follow preset paths
scenarios: 1. Daily Quest Check-In: Wakes up and opens AR-PI-GI on his smartphone, checks daily quests and nearby missions in his city, completes a quick scavenger hunt at a local park to earn XP and coins | 2. Raid: Receives a notification that his team is attacking a nearby portal, puts on AR glasses and goes to the location, captures the portal and defends it against rival factions | 3. Role Customization: Opens the app on phone, customizes his avatar, upgrades weapons and skills, checks moral points
otherDetails: Competitive, Outgoing, Social, Friendly, Adventurous, Curious, Creative
